verdict_reason: New 28-line controller correctly enforces JSON-only intake, delegates to QueueMessageSender, relies on GlobalExceptionHandler for 400/502 paths, and is fully covered by EventsSendControllerTest; only a Minor missing-@Timed metric finding.

todos.issue: publishEvent has no @Timed annotation even though MetricsConfig already registers TimedAspect, so the gateway's only business endpoint emits no per-endpoint Micrometer metric
todos.fix: Add @Timed("events.publish") to publishEvent, matching the per-endpoint metric convention
